series_metadata.series_description: Form used by Pharmacy Services Center to internally track all outdated controlled substances. Also used to match DEA Form 41 with transaction date. Includes description of drug. date received, transaction code, lot no., expiration date, distributor, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
